message:
fix(cli): improve schema init, sqlite path resolution, and error handling

- Split multi-statement schema SQL into individual executions and track
  base migrations in a dedicated migrations table
- Apply resolve_sqlite_path_with_absolute_candidate to all robot and
  doctor-repair DB open paths for consistent path handling
- Try best-effort open before full open in open_db_sync_robot_with_database_url
- Track sqlite3_probe_succeeded for clearer diagnostic output
- Gracefully handle missing agent in list-acks instead of erroring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
